messages.content: Hi! I just moved to Berlin from NYC last month
How's Berlin treating you?
It's great! I started a new job at Notion as a PM
Congratulations on the new role!
I have a golden retriever named Biscuit, she's 3 years old
Biscuit sounds adorable! How is she adjusting to the new city?
She loves it! By the way, I'm allergic to shellfish so I have to be careful with the food here
Good to know! German cuisine has plenty of non-seafood options.
I love Python for backend work but honestly TypeScript is fine for big projects
That's a pragmatic take! What are you working on these days?
Working on a side project using React Native. Actually I meant React Native, not React — it's a mobile app
React Native is a great choice for cross-platform mobile!
Yeah! It's a recipe sharing app. I'm a vegetarian too so I want to focus on plant-based recipes
That sounds like a perfect niche!
TypeScript generics are getting really annoying on this project
Yeah, complex generics can be tricky. What's the specific issue?
I think TypeScript is fine for big projects but I'd use Python for scripts and small stuff
Makes sense to use the right tool for the job.
Big news — I just joined Stripe! Leaving Notion after all. Starting Monday as a senior PM
Wow, congrats on the Stripe offer! Big move!
My birthday is coming up on April 5th! I'll be 28
Happy early birthday! Any plans?
We went to Japan last summer and it was amazing. Best trip ever. I want to go back for my birthday but flights are too expensive
Japan is incredible! Maybe a local celebration this year?
Yeah probably just dinner with my husband Carlos. He's a teacher at Berlin International School
A nice dinner sounds perfect! Carlos sounds supportive.
I'm Bob, I live in Tokyo and I work as a data engineer at Sony
Nice to meet you Bob! How's Tokyo?
I have two cats — Mochi and Soba. Mochi is orange and Soba is gray
Cute names! Do they get along?
